Label: Angiopoietin-2
Definition: Endothelial vascular permeability factor elevated in hyperinflammatory ARDS. Promotes destabilisation of endothelial junctions.

Label: Club cell secretory protein 16

Label: Interleukin-8

Label: Plasminogen activator inhibitor-1
Definition: Procoagulant inhibitor (SERPINE1). Elevated in hyperinflammatory ARDS; reflects antifibrinolytic state and alveolar fibrin deposition.

Label: Protein C

Label: Serum bicarbonate

Label: Soluble receptor for advanced glycation end-products
Definition: Circulating RAGE ectodomain; marker of type I alveolar epithelial injury. Elevated in hyperinflammatory ARDS. Predicts 90-day mortality.

Label: Soluble tumour necrosis factor receptor 1

Label: Surfactant protein D
Definition: Collectin secreted by alveolar type II cells. Serum SP-D marks alveolar-capillary barrier disruption.

Label: Tumor necrosis factor alpha
Definition: Pro-inflammatory cytokine. Elevated in early ARDS; promotes NF-κB and endothelial injury. Elevated in hyperinflammatory subphenotype.
